message:
fix(fp-frame): agg_named rejects duplicate output names, fix test assertions

agg_named could produce a malformed DataFrame when two specs used
the same output_name: BTreeMap silently replaced the first value
but col_order kept both entries, creating an inconsistency.

Fixed by validating for duplicate output names before processing.

Also fixed: key column check now uses iter().any() instead of
allocating a String for contains(). Values test now correctly
asserts Int64 for count (not Float64).

Added regression test for duplicate output name rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
